_doc: De-confounding model grid for the skill-pool canary-leakage curve (TMLR upgrade of p4). Every id is verified available_on_current_plan on Featherless (api.featherless.ai/v1) as of 2026-06-16. The original paper's n=4 was an artifact of Groq's ~8-model catalog; this grid separates the SIZE axis from the ALIGNMENT axis so 'alignment, not scale' becomes a measured effect with the confound held constant rather than a 4-point pattern. Arms: A=scale ladder (alignment held), B=scale ladder 2nd family, C/D/E=alignment axis at FIXED scale (size+family+base-weights held; abliterated = stock instruct with the refusal direction surgically removed = the ideal alignment isolator), F=reasoning models for the answer-only-vs-reasoning-inclusive CoT split (Item 2). Models shared across arms are listed once with all arm tags.
_gating: The official meta-llama/* and google/gemma-2-9b-it repos are GATED on Featherless (return HTTP 403 'Connect HuggingFace for this organization') even though available_on_current_plan=true. CLEAN FIX: connect a HuggingFace account on featherless.ai once -> the canonical 'id' resolves with zero provenance caveat (preferred for the paper). FALLBACK (runnable today, no HF connect): the runner falls back to 'mirror' (a verified-open re-upload of the same weights) when set. Mirrors carry a small 'is this bit-identical to Meta/Google's release?' caveat a reviewer could raise, so connect HF for the final run.

models.note: HF-CONNECT REQUIRED: no working open mirror — every community Llama-3.2-1B re-upload (unsloth/alpindale/...) hits a Featherless-side 'transformers v4.44 chat template' HTTP 400; the canonical Meta repo works once HF is connected.
HF-CONNECT REQUIRED: same Llama-3.2 chat-template 400 on community mirrors.
stock 3.1-8B-Instruct with refusal direction removed; identical base weights -> isolates alignment at fixed scale
independent uncensored finetune -> robustness for the abliterated point
stock gemma-2-9b-it further safety-tuned on WildGuard jailbreak data -> extends the alignment axis ABOVE stock
original paper's safety-tuned anchor; separate reasoning channel
reasoning model at EXACTLY 8B same base family as Arm C -> isolates the reasoning-trace leak surface at fixed scale+family
